groups.name: rate-limiter
groups.description: Configuration properties for the API rate limiter.

properties.name: rate-limiter.enabled
properties.description: Whether the rate limiter is enabled globally.

properties.name: rate-limiter.fail-open
properties.description: If true, requests are allowed when Redis is unavailable. If false, requests are rejected.

properties.name: rate-limiter.backend
properties.description: Storage backend type: 'redis' for distributed deployments, 'in-memory' for local/dev.

properties.name: rate-limiter.exclude-paths
properties.description: Ant-style path patterns to exclude from rate limiting (e.g., /actuator/**, /health).

properties.name: rate-limiter.policies
properties.description: List of rate limiting policies to enforce.

values.description: Reject requests that exceed the limit.
Evaluate and log/meter, but never reject (shadow mode).
Fixed Window Counter — simple, fast, boundary spike possible.
Sliding Window Counter — smooths boundary spikes.
